title: Add command and flag aliases
description:
Add convenience aliases for the command/flag names agents repeatedly reached for.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `jit dependency` and `jit document` resolve to `jit dep` and `jit doc`.
- [ ] `jit issue list` resolves to (or redirects to) `jit query`.
- [ ] `--add-label` is accepted as an alias for `--label` on `issue update`.
